# Geo city sugar (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Geo city sugar.

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | alter city = payload -> geo.city | fields src, city | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 9). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
